title: Gabrovo, Gabrovo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Gabrovo, Gabrovo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Gabrovo is a city in Gabrovo with a population of 58,950. The Bulgarian capital of humour and satire, home to the House of Humour and Satire museum, and a gateway to the UNESCO-listed Bozhentsi and Etara architectural reserves.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
